user_system_path: Repo hardening Batch 1 (#425): delete verified zero-import dead code — the orphaned dashboard component cluster, dead foldera/ui components, dead lib modules (cold-read, utils/request-ip, utils/retry re-export, agents barrel), the orphaned dashboard-page-model + its tests. Pure cleanup; no runtime/user-path behavior changes. NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Batch 1 deletes dead components/lib/app modules + their tests, and edits lib/utils/index.ts barrel + two tests/config meta-tests. Deletions are diff-filter-exempt; modifications stay within components/**, app/dashboard/**, lib/**, tests/** + control plane.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema, API route, or dependency changes in this batch.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run build && npm run lint
required_browser_proof: N/A — dead-code deletion, no user-facing path change.
acceptance_condition: All listed orphans deleted, zero dangling references (npm run build green = no missing-import errors), lib/utils barrel + affected meta-tests updated, vitest green, gate:continuity green.
anti_regression_checks: npm run build green (catches any dangling import to a deleted module)
no live route or component still imports a deleted module
stop_condition: Stop when Batch 1 is merged and the control plane is ready for Batch 2 (or rolled to between-rungs at session end).
next_command: Proceed to Batch 2 — type safety (typecheck npm script, un-exclude tests/scripts in tsconfig, drive tsc errors to zero).
